Kick the Zombie

Do you remember computers before the Internet? The times we used to play desktop destruction games... You would pick the hammer and crash the screen until it breaks into a thousand pieces virtually. If you're a 90's kid who used to enjoy desktop destroyers, here is the new generation of stress relief: Kick the Zombie!

Play Kick the Zombie Online

Loading game...
About Kick the Zombie

Do you remember computers before the Internet? The times we used to play desktop destruction games... You would pick the hammer and crash the screen until it breaks into a thousand pieces virtually. If you're a 90's kid who used to enjoy desktop destroyers, here is the new generation of stress relief: Kick the Zombie! This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Kick the Zombie in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Clicker game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Kick the Zombie for free?

Yes. Kick the Zombie is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Kick the Zombie?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
